001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.csv;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
023
024import java.io.*;
025import java.time.*;
026import java.time.Duration;
027import java.time.temporal.*;
028import java.util.*;
029
030import javax.xml.datatype.*;
031
032import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.commons.lang.*;
034import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
035import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
036import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
037import org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap.*;
038
039/**
040 * Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of {@link CsvSerializer}.
041 *
042 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
043 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe and is typically discarded after one use.
044 * </ul>
045 *
046 */
047@SuppressWarnings({
048   "java:S110", // Inheritance depth acceptable for serializer session hierarchy
049   "java:S115", // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention (e.g., ARG_ctx)
050   "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for doSerialize, formatForCsvCell
051   "java:S6541", // Brain method acceptable for doSerialize, formatForCsvCell
052   "resource"   // Internal helpers return Closeables wired into pipe lifecycle; Eclipse JDT @Owning warning is by design.
053})
054public class CsvSerializerSession extends WriterSerializerSession implements RecordWritable {
055
056   // Property name constants
057   private static final String PROP_byteArrayFormat = "byteArrayFormat";
058   private static final String PROP_allowNestedStructures = "allowNestedStructures";
059   private static final String PROP_nullValue = "nullValue";
060   private static final String PROP_CsvSerializerSession_byteArrayFormat = "CsvSerializerSession.byteArrayFormat";
061   private static final String PROP_CsvSerializerSession_allowNestedStructures = "CsvSerializerSession.allowNestedStructures";
062   private static final String PROP_CsvSerializerSession_nullValue = "CsvSerializerSession.nullValue";
063
064   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
065   private static final String ARG_ctx = "ctx";
066
067   private final CsvByteArrayCellFormat byteArrayFormat;
068   private final boolean allowNestedStructures;
069   private final String nullValue;
070
071   /**
072    * Builder class.
073    */
074   @SuppressWarnings({
075      "java:S110" // Inheritance depth acceptable for builder hierarchy
076   })
077   public static class Builder extends WriterSerializerSession.Builder<Builder> {
078
079      private CsvByteArrayCellFormat byteArrayFormat;
080      private boolean allowNestedStructures;
081      private String nullValue;
082
083      /**
084       * Constructor
085       *
086       * @param ctx The context creating this session.
087       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
088       */
089      protected Builder(CsvSerializer ctx) {
090         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
091         byteArrayFormat = ctx.getByteArrayFormat();
092         allowNestedStructures = ctx.isAllowNestedStructures();
093         nullValue = ctx.getNullValue();
094      }
095
096      /**
097       * Allow nested structures.
098       *
099       * @param value The new value for this property.
100       * @return This object.
101       */
102      public Builder allowNestedStructures(boolean value) {
103         allowNestedStructures = value;
104         return this;
105      }
106
107      @Override
108      public CsvSerializerSession build() {
109         return new CsvSerializerSession(this);
110      }
111
112      /**
113       * Byte array format.
114       *
115       * @param value The new value for this property.
116       * @return This object.
117       */
118      public Builder byteArrayFormat(CsvByteArrayCellFormat value) {
119         if (nn(value))
120            byteArrayFormat = value;
121         return this;
122      }
123
124      /**
125       * Null value string.
126       *
127       * @param value The new value for this property. Can be <jk>null</jk> (resets to default).
128       * @return This object.
129       */
130      public Builder nullValue(String value) {
131         nullValue = value;
132         return this;
133      }
134
135      @Override /* Overridden from Builder */
136      public Builder property(String key, Object value) {
137         if (key == null) {
138            super.property(key, value);
139            return this;
140         }
141         switch (key) {
142            case PROP_byteArrayFormat, PROP_CsvSerializerSession_byteArrayFormat:
143               return byteArrayFormat(cvt(value, CsvByteArrayCellFormat.class));
144            case PROP_allowNestedStructures, PROP_CsvSerializerSession_allowNestedStructures:
145               return allowNestedStructures(cvt(value, Boolean.class));
146            case PROP_nullValue, PROP_CsvSerializerSession_nullValue:
147               return nullValue(cvt(value, String.class));
148            default:
149               super.property(key, value);
150               return this;
151         }
152      }
153
154   }
155
156   /**
157    * Creates a new builder for this object.
158    *
159    * @param ctx The context creating this session.
160    *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
161    * @return A new builder.
162    */
163   public static Builder create(CsvSerializer ctx) {
164      return new Builder(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
165   }
166
167   /**
168    * Constructor.
169    *
170    * @param builder The builder for this object.
171    */
172   protected CsvSerializerSession(Builder builder) {
173      super(builder);
174      byteArrayFormat = builder.byteArrayFormat;
175      allowNestedStructures = builder.allowNestedStructures;
176      nullValue = builder.nullValue != null ? builder.nullValue : "<NULL>";
177   }
178
179   @Override /* RecordWritable */
180   public RecordWriter serializeRecords(Object output) throws IOException {
181      return RecordAdapter.arrayWriter(this, output);
182   }
183
184   @Override /* RecordWritable */
185   public boolean isRecordStreaming() {
186      return false;
187   }
188
189   /**
190    * Applies any registered object swap to the specified value.
191    *
192    * <p>
193    * If a swap is registered for the value's type, the value is transformed using the swap's
194    * {@code swap()} method before being serialized.
195    *
196    * @param value The value to potentially swap.
197    * @param type The class metadata of the value's type.
198    * @return The swapped value, or the original value if no swap is registered.
199    */
200   @SuppressWarnings({
201      "rawtypes" // Raw types necessary for ObjectSwap handling
202   })
203   private Object applySwap(Object value, ClassMeta<?> type) {
204      try {
205         if (value == null || type == null)
206            return value;
207
208         ObjectSwap swap = type.getSwap(this);
209         if (nn(swap)) {
210            return swap(swap, value);
211         }
212         if (type.isDate())
213            return serializeDate((Date)value, type);
214         if (type.isCalendar())
215            return serializeCalendar(value, type);
216         if (type.isTemporal())
217            return serializeTemporal((TemporalAccessor)value, type);
218         if (type.isDuration())
219            return serializeDuration((Duration)value);
220         if (type.isPeriod())
221            return serializePeriod((Period)value);
222         return value;
223      } catch (SerializeException e) {
224         throw rex(e);
225      }
226   }
227
228   @SuppressWarnings({
229      "rawtypes", // Raw types necessary for generic type handling
230      "unchecked" // Type erasure requires unchecked casts
231   })
232   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerSession */
233   protected void doSerialize(SerializerPipe pipe, Object o) throws IOException, SerializeException {
234      var cm = push2("root", o, getClassMetaForObject(o));
235      if (cm == null)
236         return;
237      try {
238         try (var w = getCsvWriter(pipe)) {
239            Collection<?> l = null;
240            if (cm.isArray()) {
241            // Primitive arrays and byte[] serialize as single row (value = [1;2;3] or base64)
242            if (o.getClass().getComponentType().isPrimitive())
243               l = Collections.singletonList(o);
244            else
245               l = l((Object[])o);
246         } else if (cm.isCollection()) {
247            l = (Collection<?>)o;
248         } else if (cm.isStreamable()) {
249            // CSV must inspect first element for column headers, so materialization is unavoidable.
250            l = toListFromStreamable(o, cm);
251         } else {
252            l = Collections.singleton(o);
253         }
254
255         if (ine(l)) {
256            var firstOpt = first(l);
257            if (!firstOpt.isPresent())
258               return;
259
260            // Apply any registered swap to the first element to determine column structure.
261            var firstRaw = firstOpt.get();
262            var firstEntry = applySwap(firstRaw, getClassMetaForObject(firstRaw));
263            var entryType = getClassMetaForObject(firstEntry);
264            // If swapped type is not a bean (e.g. interface proxy), use raw type for strategy
265            if (! entryType.isBean() && firstRaw != null) {
266               var rawType = getClassMetaForObject(firstRaw);
267               if (rawType.isBean())
268                  entryType = rawType;
269            }
270
271            // Expected type for each element (for type discriminator)
272            var eType = cm.isArray() || cm.isCollection() || cm.isStreamable()
273               ? cm.getElementType()
274               : getExpectedRootType(firstRaw);
275
276            // CSV is flat; when addBeanTypes or addRootType is set, add _type column to all rows
277            var addTypeColumn = isAddBeanTypes() || isAddRootType();
278            var typeColName = addTypeColumn ? getBeanTypePropertyName(entryType) : null;
279
280            // Determine the best representation strategy.
281            // Use the BeanMeta from the entry type for bean serialization.
282            var bm = entryType.isBean() ? entryType.getBeanMeta() : null;
283
284            if (bm != null) {
285               // Bean or DynaBean path: header row = property names + optional _type
286               var addComma = Flag.create();
287               bm.getProperties().values().stream().filter(BeanPropertyMeta::canRead).forEach(x -> {
288                  addComma.ifSet(() -> w.w(',')).set();
289                  w.writeEntry(x.getName());
290               });
291               // Always append _type when addBeanTypes or addRootType to support polymorphic parsing
292               if (addTypeColumn && ine(typeColName)) {
293                  w.w(',');
294                  w.writeEntry(typeColName);
295               }
296               w.append('\n');
297               var readableProps = bm.getProperties().values().stream().filter(BeanPropertyMeta::canRead).toList();
298               l.forEach(x -> {
299                  var addComma2 = Flag.create();
300                  if (x == null) {
301                     // Null entry: write null marker for each column
302                     readableProps.forEach(y -> {
303                        addComma2.ifSet(() -> w.w(',')).set();
304                        w.writeEntry(nullValue);
305                     });
306                     if (addTypeColumn && ine(typeColName)) {
307                        w.w(',');
308                        w.writeEntry("");
309                     }
310                  } else {
311                     // Apply swap before extracting bean properties (e.g. surrogate swaps)
312                     var swapped = applySwap(x, getClassMetaForObject(x));
313                     var aType = getClassMetaForObject(swapped);
314                     // When swap yields non-bean (e.g. String), use raw object for property extraction
315                     var objForBean = aType.isBean() ? swapped : x;
316                     BeanMap<?> bean = toBeanMap(objForBean);
317                     readableProps.forEach(y -> {
318                        addComma2.ifSet(() -> w.w(',')).set();
319                        var value = y.get(bean, y.getName());
320                        value = formatIfDateOrDuration(value);
321                        value = formatForCsvCell(value);
322                        // Use toString() to respect trimStrings setting on String values
323                        if (value instanceof String s) value = toString(s);
324                        w.writeEntry(value != null ? value : nullValue);
325                     });
326                     if (addTypeColumn && ine(typeColName)) {
327                        var typeName = getBeanTypeName(this, eType, aType, null);
328                        w.w(',');
329                        w.writeEntry(typeName != null ? typeName : "");
330                     }
331                  }
332                  w.w('\n');
333               });
334            } else if (entryType.isMap()) {
335               // Map path: header row = map keys from the first entry + optional _type
336               var addComma = Flag.create();
337               var first = (Map) firstEntry;
338               first.keySet().forEach(x -> {
339                  addComma.ifSet(() -> w.w(',')).set();
340                  // Apply trimStrings to map keys as well
341                  Object keyVal;
342                  if (x == null)
343                     keyVal = nullValue;
344                  else if (x instanceof String s)
345                     keyVal = toString(s);
346                  else
347                     keyVal = x;
348                  w.writeEntry(keyVal);
349               });
350               if (addTypeColumn && ine(typeColName)) {
351                  w.w(',');
352                  w.writeEntry(typeColName);
353               }
354               w.append('\n');
355               l.forEach(x -> {
356                  var addComma2 = Flag.create();
357                  var swapped = applySwap(x, getClassMetaForObject(x));
358                  var aType = getClassMetaForObject(swapped);
359                  var map = (Map) swapped;
360                  map.values().forEach(y -> {
361                     addComma2.ifSet(() -> w.w(',')).set();
362                     var value = applySwap(y, getClassMetaForObject(y));
363                     value = formatForCsvCell(value);
364                     // Apply trimStrings to map values
365                     if (value instanceof String s) value = toString(s);
366                     w.writeEntry(value != null ? value : nullValue);
367                  });
368                  if (addTypeColumn && ine(typeColName)) {
369                     var typeName = getBeanTypeName(this, eType, aType, null);
370                     w.w(',');
371                     w.writeEntry(typeName != null ? typeName : "");
372                  }
373                  w.w('\n');
374               });
375            } else {
376               // Simple value path: single "value" column + optional _type
377               w.writeEntry("value");
378               if (addTypeColumn && ine(typeColName)) {
379                  w.w(',');
380                  w.writeEntry(typeColName);
381               }
382               w.append('\n');
383               l.forEach(x -> {
384                  var value = applySwap(x, getClassMetaForObject(x));
385                  value = formatForCsvCell(value);
386                  // Use toString() to respect trimStrings setting
387                  w.writeEntry(value != null ? toString(value) : nullValue);
388                  if (addTypeColumn && ine(typeColName)) {
389                     if (x != null) {
390                        var aType = getClassMetaForObject(x);
391                        var typeName = getBeanTypeName(this, eType, aType, null);
392                        w.w(',');
393                        w.writeEntry(typeName != null ? typeName : "");
394                     } else {
395                        w.w(',');
396                        w.writeEntry("");
397                     }
398                  }
399                  w.w('\n');
400               });
401            }
402         }
403         }
404      } finally {
405         pop();
406      }
407   }
408
409
410   private Object formatIfDateOrDuration(Object value) {
411      if (value == null)
412         return null;
413      var cm = getClassMetaForObject(value);
414      if (value instanceof Date d)
415         return serializeDate(d, cm);
416      if (value instanceof Calendar || value instanceof javax.xml.datatype.XMLGregorianCalendar)
417         return serializeCalendar(value, cm);
418      if (value instanceof TemporalAccessor t)
419         return serializeTemporal(t, cm);
420      if (value instanceof Duration)
421         return value.toString();
422      return value;
423   }
424
425   /**
426    * Formats a value for a CSV cell, handling byte[], primitive arrays, and nested structures.
427    */
428   private Object formatForCsvCell(Object value) {
429      if (value == null)
430         return null;
431      if (allowNestedStructures) {
432         var type = getClassMetaForObject(value);
433         if (value instanceof Map || value instanceof Collection || value instanceof Object[]
434               || (type.isBean() && !(value instanceof Map)))
435            return new CsvCellSerializer(byteArrayFormat, nullValue).serialize(value, this);
436      }
437      if (value instanceof byte[] b) {
438         return byteArrayFormat == CsvByteArrayCellFormat.SEMICOLON_DELIMITED
439            ? formatByteArraySemicolon(b)
440            : base64Encode(b);
441      }
442      if (value instanceof int[] a) {
443         var sb = new StringBuilder();
444         sb.append('[');
445         for (var i = 0; i < a.length; i++) {
446            if (i > 0) sb.append(';');
447            sb.append(a[i]);
448         }
449         sb.append(']');
450         return sb.toString();
451      }
452      if (value instanceof long[] a) {
453         var sb = new StringBuilder();
454         sb.append('[');
455         for (var i = 0; i < a.length; i++) {
456            if (i > 0) sb.append(';');
457            sb.append(a[i]);
458         }
459         sb.append(']');
460         return sb.toString();
461      }
462      if (value instanceof double[] a) {
463         var sb = new StringBuilder();
464         sb.append('[');
465         for (var i = 0; i < a.length; i++) {
466            if (i > 0) sb.append(';');
467            sb.append(a[i]);
468         }
469         sb.append(']');
470         return sb.toString();
471      }
472      if (value instanceof float[] a) {
473         var sb = new StringBuilder();
474         sb.append('[');
475         for (var i = 0; i < a.length; i++) {
476            if (i > 0) sb.append(';');
477            sb.append(a[i]);
478         }
479         sb.append(']');
480         return sb.toString();
481      }
482      if (value instanceof short[] a) {
483         var sb = new StringBuilder();
484         sb.append('[');
485         for (var i = 0; i < a.length; i++) {
486            if (i > 0) sb.append(';');
487            sb.append(a[i]);
488         }
489         sb.append(']');
490         return sb.toString();
491      }
492      if (value instanceof boolean[] a) {
493         var sb = new StringBuilder();
494         sb.append('[');
495         for (var i = 0; i < a.length; i++) {
496            if (i > 0) sb.append(';');
497            sb.append(a[i]);
498         }
499         sb.append(']');
500         return sb.toString();
501      }
502      if (value instanceof char[] a) {
503         var sb = new StringBuilder();
504         sb.append('[');
505         for (var i = 0; i < a.length; i++) {
506            if (i > 0) sb.append(';');
507            sb.append((int) a[i]);
508         }
509         sb.append(']');
510         return sb.toString();
511      }
512      return value;
513   }
514
515   private static String formatByteArraySemicolon(byte[] b) {
516      var sb = new StringBuilder();
517      for (var i = 0; i < b.length; i++) {
518         if (i > 0) sb.append(';');
519         sb.append(b[i] & 0xff);
520      }
521      return sb.toString();
522   }
523
524   /**
525    * Prepares a value for inline cell serialization (bean→Map, date format, etc.).
526    * Used by {@link CsvCellSerializer}.
527    */
528   Object prepareForInlineValue(Object value) {
529      if (value == null)
530         return null;
531      var swapped = applySwap(value, getClassMetaForObject(value));
532      var type = getClassMetaForObject(swapped);
533      if (type.isBean() && !(swapped instanceof Map))
534         return toBeanMap(swapped);
535      if (swapped instanceof Date d)
536         return serializeDate(d, type);
537      if (swapped instanceof Calendar || swapped instanceof XMLGregorianCalendar)
538         return serializeCalendar(swapped, type);
539      if (swapped instanceof TemporalAccessor t)
540         return serializeTemporal(t, type);
541      if (swapped instanceof Duration)
542         return swapped.toString();
543      return swapped;
544   }
545
546   CsvWriter getCsvWriter(SerializerPipe out) {
547      var output = out.getRawOutput();
548      if (output instanceof CsvWriter output2)
549         return output2;
550      var w = new CsvWriter(out.getWriter(), isUseWhitespace(), getMaxIndent(), getQuoteChar(), isTrimStrings(), getUriResolver());
551      out.setWriter(w);
552      return w;
553   }
554}
